x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Assessment templates define the structure for vendor evaluations that Now Assist uses to generate AI-assisted scoring and summaries. Well-configured templates improve the accuracy and consistency of AI-generated assessment outputs.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure assessment templates in TPRM to standardize vendor evaluations.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_13f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3b
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Assessment templates define the structure for vendor evaluations that Now Assist uses to generate AI-assisted scoring and summaries. Well-configured templates improve the accuracy and consistency of AI-generated assessment outputs.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Assessment Templates Configured</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_vdr_risk_asmt_template");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=3)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" templates",finding:c+" assessment templates configured."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" templates",finding:c+" template(s) found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 templates",finding:"No assessment templates configured."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>TPRM</module><number>CHK0000587</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Configure assessment templates in TPRM to standardize vendor evaluations.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>13f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3b</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Assessment Templates Configured</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_13f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3b</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
